touches.ai_summary: Inbound lead from Levi Silva (VP of CS) at PrismTech expressing interest in automation solutions for their customer success team.
Initial qualification call with Levi. Discussed current CS workflows and pain points around manual processes. PrismTech is a 148-person PropTech company looking to improve rep productivity.

questions_asked.question: What's driving your interest in automation right now?
questions_asked.answer: Our CS team is spending too much time on manual follow-ups and data entry instead of customer engagement

questions_asked.question: What's your typical implementation timeline?
questions_asked.answer: Usually 4-6 weeks depending on complexity and team size

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up qualification call. Levi confirmed budget authority sits with Isaac Clark in procurement. Discussed team size (looking at 27 seats) and use case focused on rep productivity across CS and sales.

questions_asked.question: Who else should be involved in evaluating this solution?
questions_asked.answer: Isaac Clark handles procurement, Ella Collins will lead implementation, and Brandon Kumar from sales will need to evaluate technical fit

questions_asked.question: Can your platform integrate with our existing CRM?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have native integrations with all major CRMs

touches.ai_summary: Extended qualification discussion. Explored PrismTech's current tech stack and specific automation needs. Levi mentioned they're not currently evaluating other vendors. Discussed unlimited automation tier given their workflow complexity.

questions_asked.question: Have you looked at other solutions in this space?
questions_asked.answer: We did some initial research but haven't engaged with other vendors yet

questions_asked.question: What kind of ROI are your customers typically seeing?
questions_asked.answer: Most see 20-30% time savings within first quarter

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: Ideally implement before end of quarter

next_steps: Send case studies from PropTech sector

touches.ai_summary: Discovery call diving into specific workflows and pain points. Levi walked through their current processes and bottlenecks. Strong alignment on unlimited automation tier to support their complex multi-step workflows.

questions_asked.question: Can you walk me through your most time-consuming manual process?
questions_asked.answer: Property inquiry follow-ups require 6-8 manual touchpoints per lead, all logged separately

questions_asked.question: How customizable are the automation workflows?
questions_asked.answer: Fully customizable through our visual workflow builder

questions_asked.question: What does success look like for you in 6 months?
questions_asked.answer: Team spending 50% less time on admin work, more time on high-value customer interactions

next_steps: Prepare custom demo showing property follow-up automation

touches.ai_summary: Sent follow-up email with custom demo recording tailored to PrismTech's property inquiry workflow. Included PropTech customer case studies and unlimited tier pricing overview. Levi confirmed team is reviewing materials.

questions_asked.question: Can we schedule a live demo with Ella and Brandon next week?
questions_asked.answer: Absolutely, sending calendar invite

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email checking in post-demo. Levi indicated positive feedback from Ella and Brandon. Requested formal proposal with pricing for 27 seats on unlimited automation tier. No mention of executive sponsor involvement yet.

questions_asked.question: Can you include implementation timeline and support details in the proposal?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, will include full breakdown

touches.ai_summary: Proposal presentation call with Levi and Isaac Clark (procurement). Walked through pricing at $20,300 ACV for 27 seats with unlimited automation. Isaac raised questions about discount availability given deal size and timeline. No executive sponsor present.

questions_asked.question: Is there flexibility on pricing given we're moving quickly?
questions_asked.answer: Let me discuss with leadership - what's your target budget?

questions_asked.question: Should we include your CFO or another exec sponsor in next discussion?
questions_asked.answer: Not necessary at this stage, I have authority to move forward

questions_asked.question: What's included in the implementation package?
questions_asked.answer: Dedicated implementation manager, custom workflow setup, and 30 days of premium support

objections: Pricing seems high compared to budget expectations

touches.ai_summary: Pricing call rescheduled by Levi due to conflicting internal meeting. Brief conversation confirmed continued interest but Isaac is reviewing budget constraints with finance team.

questions_asked.question: Any concerns we should address before the rescheduled call?
questions_asked.answer: Just need to align internally on budget - still very interested

touches.ai_summary: Email sent with revised pricing proposal including 31.4% discount to align with PrismTech's budget constraints. Highlighted ROI calculator and payment terms flexibility. Levi acknowledged receipt and committed to internal review with Isaac.

Negotiation call with Levi and Isaac to discuss revised pricing. They're aligned on discounted price point but Isaac raised concerns about contract terms and auto-renewal clauses. Still no executive sponsor engaged despite deal size.

questions_asked.question: Can we negotiate the auto-renewal terms?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we can do manual renewal with 60-day notice period

questions_asked.question: Would it be helpful to bring in your CFO to discuss ROI projections?
questions_asked.answer: I don't think that's needed - we're close to decision

questions_asked.question: What's your cancellation policy if results don't meet expectations?
questions_asked.answer: We offer 90-day satisfaction guarantee with prorated refund

objections: Want more flexibility in contract length
next_steps: Send updated contract with revised terms

touches.ai_summary: Deep-dive pricing and terms call with Isaac leading discussion. Negotiated payment terms and implementation milestones. Isaac is cautious about commitment level given discount depth. Levi remains supportive but deferring to Isaac on final terms.

questions_asked.question: Can we structure this as quarterly payments instead of annual?
questions_asked.answer: We can do semi-annual payments with small processing fee

questions_asked.question: What's blocking us from moving to contract signature?
questions_asked.answer: Just want to ensure we're getting best possible terms before committing

questions_asked.question: Is the implementation timeline firm or flexible?
questions_asked.answer: Flexible - we work around your team's availability

touches.ai_summary: Final negotiation call with Levi, Isaac, and Ella joining to discuss implementation logistics. Team aligned on pricing, payment terms, and contract structure. Isaac requested one final internal review before signature. Still no C-level involvement noted.

questions_asked.question: Can we add a performance benchmark clause?
questions_asked.answer: We can include quarterly success metrics review

questions_asked.question: What's your internal approval process from here?
questions_asked.answer: Isaac and I have authority to sign, just want one final check with finance

questions_asked.question: When can Ella start the implementation kickoff?
questions_asked.answer: As soon as contract is signed, typically within 3-5 business days

next_steps: Contract signature targeted for this week

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with final contract incorporating all negotiated terms: 31.4% discount, semi-annual payments, manual renewal, and quarterly success reviews. Confirmed implementation timeline and next steps. Awaiting signature from Isaac and Levi.
